title: CBB Rulebook Volume 4 Risk Management Module RM-9 Cyber Security Risk Management
summary: Requires investment firms to establish NIST-aligned cybersecurity frameworks, independent cyber functions, CISO oversight, board review, senior management responsibilities, controls, cyber incident detection, recovery, training and reporting.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cybersecurity risk management rules for investment business licensees.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Cyber incident reporting rules for investment business licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines
